title: From Slop to Determinism – Shifting the Narrative Space
abstract: What I realized today while sipping my morning cup of chai is that a large part of the present AI hype cycle is just about the 'narrative of AI'. The LLM technology itself is just a digital tool like many others that came before it but all this chatter about 'AI is the future', &
abstract_zh: 今天早上喝着chai茶的时候，我突然意识到，现在大家都在讨论的“AI热潮”，其实多半是关于“AI叙事”的。这LLM技术不过就是个数字工具而已，就像以前那些被炒得火热的东西一样。但大家这么一厢情愿地认为“AI就是未来”……就像是在从烂泥堆里努力爬出一样，我们得把叙事空间转向确定性！
